9: description="Coordinates parallel research and synthesizes the
13: This code defines a multi-agent system used to research and synthesize information
14: on sustainable technology advancements. It sets up three LlmAgent instances to act
15: as specialized researchers. ResearcherAgent_1 focuses on renewable energy sources,
16: ResearcherAgent_2 researches electric vehicle technology, and ResearcherAgent_3
17: investigates carbon capture methods. Each researcher agent is configured to use a
18: GEMINI_MODEL and the google_search tool. They are instructed to summarize their
19: findings concisely (1-2 sentences) and store these summaries in the session state
21: A ParallelAgent named ParallelWebResearchAgent is then created to run these three
22: researcher agents concurrently. This allows the research to be conducted in parallel,
23: potentially saving time. The ParallelAgent completes its execution once all its
24: sub-agents (the researchers) have finished and populated the state.
25: Next, a MergerAgent (also an LlmAgent) is defined to synthesize the research results.
26: This agent takes the summaries stored in the session state by the parallel researchers
27: as input. Its instruction emphasizes that the output must be strictly based only on the
28: provided input summaries, prohibiting the addition of external knowledge. The
29: MergerAgent is designed to structure the combined findings into a report with
30: headings for each topic and a brief overall conclusion.
31: Finally, a SequentialAgent named ResearchAndSynthesisPipeline is created to
32: orchestrate the entire workflow. As the primary controller, this main agent first
33: executes the ParallelAgent to perform the research. Once the ParallelAgent is
34: complete, the SequentialAgent then executes the MergerAgent to synthesize the
35: collected information. The sequential_pipeline_agent is set as the root_agent,
36: representing the entry point for running this multi-agent system. The overall process
